flaws.description: mint-admin-token.sh:29 shell-injection (real, non-decoy) is never emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in any auditRuns entry — a false negative, with runState.gates['gate-3-security'].fingerprint/count adjusted to match the missing emission at every run.

backend/internal/server/version.go:16 shell-injection (decoy) IS emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in every auditRuns entry — a false positive, with runState.gates['gate-3-security'].fingerprint/count adjusted to include the decoy at every run.
